violations.text: Cases of bottled water were observed stored on the floor in the stock room and sales floor. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/31/2024

Door tracks to the beverage coolers have an accumulation of debris; liquid spill was observed in the reach-in refrigerator. Staff began cleaning during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/17/2025
The outside dumpster is not covered. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/17/2024
The floor tiles in the freezer area are in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. PIC stated a work order is in place. New Violation. Correct By: 06/17/2025
The floors under salesfloor shelving have an accumulation of debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 06/17/2025
The establishment does not have a written procedure for cleaning vomit and diarrhea. Inspector provided RIDOH guidance during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/17/2024
Cases of bottled water and beverages were observed stored on the floor throughout the salesfloor area. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 07/31/2024

Single service items are not being stored properly in their original protective package and/or are stored on a surface that is not clean in the salesfloor area. Packages of Styrofoam plates were observed on the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 07/31/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the Pepsi cooler have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 07/31/2024
Hand washing sinks were observed with an accumulation of film in the staff restrooms. New Violation. Correct By: 07/31/2024
The refuse area has an accumulation of trash and debris. Refuse areas shall be maintained clean to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 07/31/2024
The outside dumpsters are not covered. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. New Violation. Correct By: 07/17/2024
Employees personal food items were observed in various self-serve refrigerators. Establishment to designate an area for employee's food. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/31/2024
